roles.title: Head of Engineering
roles.description: Leading the engineering organisation across product, platform and data teams. Responsible for technical strategy, team growth and delivery of insurance and fintech products.
highlights: Leading engineering strategy and technical direction across the organisation
Driving engineering culture, standards and delivery practices

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.description: Managed the technical direction of the Growth and primary Product (On-Demand) teams, including delivery planning, team resourcing and rollout strategies. Engineering team responsibilities involving team structures, setting up partnerships and initiatives to improve Product and Discipline teams.
highlights: Managed technical direction of the Growth and On-Demand teams, including delivery planning and rollout strategies
1:1s with all engineers, coaching, goal setting and skills benchmarking across a range of seniorities
Set up partnerships and initiatives to improve Product and Discipline teams
Partnered with the People team on developing a high-functioning Engineering department
Directly involved in incident management and resolution with engineers
Instrumental in developing recruitment and onboarding across all engineering disciplines

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.description: Responsible for the group's technical vision and providing technical direction to team members. Planning the group's resourcing and project requirements.
highlights: Responsible for the group's technical vision and technical direction
Acting as the Product Owner, working directly with senior stakeholders on developing the Product
Working directly with customers on scoping new projects and leading technical investigations
Managing technical members of the group, setting long-term goals and providing a healthy group culture
Planning the group's resourcing and project requirements

roles.title: Tech Lead
roles.description: Handling professional development for developers within the group. Leading customer discussions regarding technical integrations and working closely with Producers to provide technical assessments and feasibility for new ideas.
highlights: Technical Lead on high-profile projects including Love Island UK/USA, Britain's Got Talent and other international projects
Leading customer discussions regarding technical integrations
Working closely with Producers to provide technical assessments and feasibility for new ideas
Helping to articulate difficult technical problems to non-technical members of the team
Handling professional development for developers within the group

roles.title: Head of Mobile
roles.description: Responsible for designing, engineering and maintaining front-end services. Includes Android app, web application and RESTful API services.
highlights: Designed, engineered and maintained Android, Web and API services
Facilitated team meetings and implemented agile principles to improve team efficiency
Responsible for recruitment interviews for other development roles
Implemented services in both Google Cloud and Amazon AWS
Developed React web application as a greenfield project based on continued client feedback

roles.title: Lead Android Developer
roles.description: Provided leadership to a team of engineers on a multi-client application. Carried out user research including face-to-face customer interviews, prototyping and questionnaires.
highlights: Led a team of engineers on the multi-client application
Carried out user research including customer interviews and prototyping
Travelled to Singapore for client integration and implementation
Delivered four client-customised applications
Conducted performance reviews for team members

roles.title: Android Engineer
roles.description: Sole developer on all Android applications. Complete design and architecture update of the main Android application with a minimal viable product within a short delivery time.
highlights: Sole developer on all Android applications
Complete architecture redesign and MVP delivery under tight deadlines
Worked closely with the designer on UX throughout development and testing
